title: playwright
description: Playwright is a framework for Web Testing and Automation. It allows testing Chromium, Firefox and WebKit with a single API.
notes: 浏览器自动化/测试框架，可用于测试 Web 端关卡编辑器或游戏门户

title: github-readme-stats
description: Dynamically generated stats for your github readmes.
notes: GitHub README 统计卡片生成器，美化个人游戏作品集 GitHub 主页

title: netdata
description: The fastest path to AI-powered full stack observability, even for lean teams.
notes: 实时系统监控与 AI 可观测性，可用于监控关卡编辑器性能或游戏服务器

title: redis
description: For developers, who are building real-time data-driven applications, Redis is the preferred, fastest, and most feature-rich cache, data structure server.
notes: Redis 内存数据库，可用于关卡设计工具/服务器的实时协作和缓存
